  -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
  Profile-ID  Profile-name          Type   Fix(kbps)  Assure(kbps)  Max(kbps)
  -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
  1           default               type3  0          1024          102400
  50          DOTMAC_100M           type3  0          50000         100000
  51          DOTMAC_250M           type4  0          0             250000
  -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
